Batch from CSV

Upload a CSV with columns for window number, box width and box height (mm). Header names are matched loosely (e.g. no, width, height). The current depth, advanced rules and prices are used.

Drop a CSV here, or click to choose a file

Example row: W1, 600, 600

Box Fin Mount on RTH Frame

Attach the 20965 Frame Extender. Fix the 9700791 Channel and 9700792 mount clip to the frame before window install. Fabricate the Box fin, then clip-install onto the window frame on site, then screw through the fin into the 9700790 mount.

BOX Fin to RTH Window Connection

Cross-section: 9700790 Box Fin Angle Connector, 20965 Frame Extender, 9700791 Box Fin Channel Connector, 9700792 Box Fin Mount, 01072 Box Fin, 02100 Frame and 02600 Sash.

20965 Frame extender & 02100 RTH 44mm frame

01069 Infill — cut details

9700790 Box Fin angle connector (100 × 25 × 6 angle)

9700791 Box Fin channel connector (from 01249 40 × 20 channel)

9700792 Box Fin fixing (from 01069)

9700793 Corner gusset (4 per eyebrow)
